# VER-QUIC-RFC9000-0003 - QUIC RFC 9000 Stateless Reset Versioning Verification

## Scope

This verification plan covers the RFC 9000 stateless-reset versioning slice, including retained version-profile evidence, format validation, and the permanent benchmark hook for the retained-profile formatter path.
It does not claim new QUIC version support or broader packet-format changes.

## Requirements Verified

- REQ-QUIC-RFC9000-S10P3-0029

## Verification Method

Execution, inspection, and benchmark evidence.

## Expected Result

- The endpoint retains a version-profile snapshot after the runtime shell is disposed.
- Stateless Reset emission still succeeds using the retained profile and keeps the token at the tail.
- Negative coverage rejects empty version-profile snapshots.
- The permanent benchmark suite covers the retained-profile formatter path without changing the wire shape.
- The trace links in the canonical requirement file point at the new 0003 leaf artifacts and requirement-home tests.

## Status

planned
